Katowice 2014 is heavily de-weighted (3%) as an unrealistic outlier for modern predictions. 2-week granularity for first year, monthly for year 2, quarterly/yearly beyond. Updated 6x daily. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Sell Timing Recommendation

SELL @ September 2035

Based on historical major performance (excluding Katowice 2014), the optimal sell window for Budapest 2025 stickers is around 10 Years after release (~September 2035), when similar-age majors averaged +11127% ROI.

Reference majors at that age: Cologne 2014, Katowice 2015, Cologne 2015, Cluj-Napoca 2015, Columbus 2016, Cologne 2016, Atlanta 2017, Krakow 2017, Boston 2018, London 2018, Katowice 2019, Berlin 2019
